Deepti Sharma is among Test cricket’s best bowlers

In only 10 innings in six Test matches Deepti Sharma has made a place among Test cricket’s elite bowlers.

Note: Minimum 20 wickets for Test matches, minimum 70 wickets for One-Day Internationals and minimum 50 wickets for T20 Internationals.

Source: Cricinfo
